steps.title: This is Part 2 to the QIAseq FastSelect Protocol
steps.instruction: This is Part 2 to the QIAseq FastSelect Protocol. This protocol is used to perform the addition of samples with mastermix into a plate. Links: * [Part 1: Sample Normalization](http://protocols.opentrons.com/protocol/0b97ae) * [Part 2: QIAseq FastSelect Fragmentation](http://protocols.opentrons.com/protocol/0b97ae-protocol-2A)

steps.title: The diluted RNA plate will be...
steps.instruction: The diluted RNA plate will be placed on the temperature module placed on site 7.

steps.title: The Mastermix Plate will be placed...
steps.instruction: The Mastermix Plate will be placed on temperature module placed on site 10. The volume for the MasterMix will be adjust in the protocol, depending on the RNA Volume put into the drop down.
